programme.title: Millionaire Holiday Home Swap
programme.desc: Millionaire Holiday Home Swap is an elite club of rich people who exchange... holiday homes with each other.Thanks to this, they can relax in luxurious conditions in various corners of the world.

programme.title: The TikTok Effect
programme.desc: TikTok has taken the world by storm, gaining impressive user growth every month.The feature set by marketers that distinguishes the application from other Internet services is to encourage people to create creatively.However, the app's turbocharged algorithm began to get out of control.Even its moderators cannot keep up with the speed and scale of TikTok's development.The case is being looked at by Marianna Spring, the BBC's first correspondent covering disinformation and social media.The journalist's interlocutors are former employees.Their statements provide a completely new insight into the company.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies: Revisits
programme.desc: Specialists from Christian Jessen's team and their patients who reported problems of a physiological or physiognomic nature to doctors meet again.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies: Revisits
programme.desc: Specialists from Christian Jessen's team and their patients who reported problems of a physiological or physiognomic nature to doctors meet again.

programme.title: Windsor Castle
programme.desc: Documentarians investigate the secrets of Windsor Castle.

programme.desc: Millionaire Holiday Home Swap is an elite club of rich people who exchange... holiday homes with each other.Thanks to this, they can relax in luxurious conditions in various corners of the world.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Another edition of the extremely popular culinary show.To impress the jurors and overcome the next stages of the program, the competitors must reach the heights of their skills.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee: Wardrobe Staples Week
Come Dine with Me 21
programme.desc: Another edition of the competition between chefs whose task is to organize the perfect party.Each participant will prepare an exquisite dinner.The rest evaluate these struggles.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Weighs
programme.desc: Six overweight Britons set off on a journey around the world.In this way, they intend to look at the causes of the global problem of obesity.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies: Revisits
programme.desc: Specialists from Christian Jessen's team and their patients who reported problems of a physiological or physiognomic nature to doctors meet again.

programme.title: Skin A\u0026E
programme.desc: The fourth installment of the program revealing the stories of people struggling with skin diseases.They often cause unpleasant or embarrassing symptoms.A team of dermatologists will try to help patients.

programme.title: Windsor Castle
programme.desc: Documentarians investigate the secrets of Windsor Castle.

programme.title: Millionaire Holiday Home Swap
programme.desc: Millionaire Holiday Home Swap is an elite club of rich people who exchange... holiday homes with each other.Thanks to this, they can relax in luxurious conditions in various corners of the world.

programme.title: The Price of a Perfect Body with Olivia Attwood
programme.desc: Reality star, TV presenter and model Olivia Attwood reveals the behind-the-scenes of plastic surgery.It draws attention to the risks associated with the surgeries that people undergo in pursuit of the ideal.

programme.title: The Price of a Perfect Body with Olivia Attwood
programme.desc: Reality star, TV presenter and model Olivia Attwood reveals the behind-the-scenes of plastic surgery.It draws attention to the risks associated with the surgeries that people undergo in pursuit of the ideal.
